plan: Sell all leveraged ETFs as they are high risk.
Reduce exposure to the downtrending semiconductor ETF.
Trim the largest position (SPY) to reduce concentration.
Increase allocation to the income-focused ETF for stability.
Add a top-rated healthcare ETF for diversification.
This plan prioritizes capital preservation with lower volatility.
conservative.read: This plan aims for lower monthly returns with a focus on capital preservation. Expect significantly reduced drawdowns compared to the current book.

plan: Trim leveraged ETFs to a minimal allocation.
Reduce exposure to the downtrending semiconductor ETF.
Trim the largest position (SPY) to meet concentration limits.
Slightly increase allocation to a broad index ETF.
Add a high-rated semiconductor stock for growth potential.
Add a strong tech stock to diversify and capture upside.
balanced.read: This balanced plan seeks moderate growth while reducing key risks like leverage and concentration. Expect more stable returns than aggressive but higher than conservative.

plan: Increase allocation to the leveraged semiconductor ETF.
Reduce exposure to the downtrending semiconductor ETF.
Trim the largest position (SPY) to reduce concentration.
Increase allocation to a broad index ETF to leverage.
Add a top-rated semiconductor stock for growth.
Add another high-scoring tech stock for further concentration.
aggressive.read: This aggressive plan maximizes potential returns by increasing leverage and concentration. Expect higher potential gains but also significantly larger drawdowns and risk of rapid loss.

plan: Sell all leveraged and high-beta single name ETFs.
Eliminate volatile semiconductor exposure entirely.
Trim the largest position (SPY) to reduce concentration.
Maximize allocation to the income-focused ETF.
Add a defensive sector ETF for stability.
This plan prioritizes steady income and capital preservation.
income.read: This income-focused plan prioritizes steady monthly distributions and low volatility. Expect minimal growth and limited downside, with distributions being variable.
